events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a trench protection setup that appears to be in good condition - planned guards in place, access control set up, crew protection in place, daily briefing signed, no active exposure visible. This seems like a pass situation.

Let me evaluate:
- Decision: pass (no unsafe conditions described)
- Risk: low (everything appears properly set up)
- Work stage: in-progress (as stated in the context)
- Component conditions: none flagged
- Percent complete: hard to say, but the protection is in place during active work, maybe 50% as a rough estimate
- Findings: none
- Actions: none needed beyond continued compliance
- References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P
